heading: mongomirror 0.10.0
body:
Features and improvements:

- New option [--noIndexRestore](mongomirror.--noIndexRestore) to omit indexes
  when migrating data.

- New option [--awsSessionToken](mongomirror.--awsSessionToken) to authenticate with
  an AWS IAM role.

- MongoDB v4.4 is now available as both a source and destination database
  version.

Bug fixes:

- Improved error handling when a URI connection string is given for the
  [--host](mongomirror.--host) option.
